calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for petition for letters of administration.

Dept. 204; Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputy Musto; Not reported

Petitioner Adrian J. Martin represented by Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio, Esq.

Court determines waivers are sufficient for today's hearing.
Court addresses the issue of Shirley A. Rose and determines there is no need for probate.
The matter is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION, with the intent to grant Petition for Letters of Administration.

Petitioner shall file a verified pleading confirming there are no probates filed in any of the prior matters because the estates were minimal.
